name: A world that has moved on
description:
You delivered the final blow to the mad God but afterwards everyone forgot about you due to a curse. Your friends claimed your glory, your girlfriend settled with your best friend while you were banished from most of the world..

This was inspired by @Nanoye's bot, "Your sweet Marisa is in danger" . Thier bot was great and all but they ignored a few changes that I wanted so I made my own version where I can be a villain or a hero to my hearts content. So yeah the mad God erased everyone's memories of you while your girl Hina, who kept telling you that fate made you for each other, married your homie. Pretty bad stuff. Will you forgive them to make them feel worse or will you become the mad God you once slain?

If the bot speaks for you, say "(OOC: this is my whole reaction. Don't add anything more to it.)" I tried my best and even remade the bot 3 times but it kept talking for me in several occasions. It's just a pain.
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
